sessions.summary: Zak power-trained 66→72 OVR via 30-session Press the Play blitz; discovered paused-SA unblocks attribute power-training; won Elite League 4-0 with new 4-4-1-1 lineup designed for T. Malka suspension
accomplishments: Power-trained Din Zak from OVR 66 to 72 (+6) via 30 sessions of Press the Play (Hard) × 6 slots over an extended live coaching session
Defense rating jumped 91 to 107; every bright Defense attribute gained +20 (Tackling, Marking, Positioning, Bravery, Aggression); Heading untouched (drill doesn't hit it)
Discovered new mechanic: pausing SA (not just maxing) unblocks attribute power-training, overrides 2026-05-19 'must be maxed' rule

Documented 27-session rotation pattern: Group A (Tackling+Bravery) and Group B (Marking+Positioning) alternate with Aggression appearing independently; full-sweep (+5) sessions alternate with partial (+2/+3) sessions; ~3.7 attrs/session average
Redefined fast trainer per user feedback: +3-4 TOTAL attrs/session across any combo, NOT +3 per single attribute
Designed 4-4-1-1 lineup for T. Malka red-card suspension: Sarabia GK, Kim/Vicedomini/Zak/Sponar back 4, Niv+Sharkat MC, Poitrinal ML, Donoso MR, Duek ST
Won Elite League match 4-0 with the new lineup
Identified pack budget tradeoff: 40 packs/day shared between full-squad match restore (~11 packs/match) and single-player power training; realistic Zak budget = 15-20 sessions/day not 40
Updated memory file top-eleven-game.md with Zak's new stats, paused-SA rule, and session pattern findings
Updated Obsidian Top Eleven concept note with two changelog entries (114000 baseline + 180000 result + late-session additions)
sessions.blockers: Daily ad limit reached after session 30; Vicedomini SA (4/50) blocks his power-training; Heading 72 still weak on Zak (Press the Play doesn't hit it)

sessions.summary: Investigated INC27727425 (D&H Distributing — Emarsys Email Opened/Clicked not ingesting to CDP); captured Yedidyah's gold tip identifying missing primaryCdpId on Emarsys contacts as likely root cause; drafted external info reply
accomplishments: Pulled INC27727425 from ServiceNow — D&H Distributing, BU 4_eaBA7wtAcLO5GybFa6iwMg on eu5, routed from Igor Ladnik (CX GY 2nd Level) to CX GY DEV CDP Hub Team with note 'no callId, need more expertise'
Mapped customer symptoms: green Emarsys source connector, schema mapped, listener generated, Postman/playground 3/3 success, but zero real-event ingestion in CDP monitoring

Captured Yedidyah's tip mid-investigation: Email Opened/Clicked events only ingest if Emarsys profile carries cd_id (primaryCdpId); fix path is automatic CDP↔Emarsys sync OR a legacy action sending primaryCdpId in payload
Saved tip as memory reference-emarsys-cdp-activity-ingestion.md and indexed in MEMORY.md for future Emarsys investigations
Drafted external info reply for the incident explaining the cd_id requirement and asking customer to confirm sync path + cd_id presence on the two sample contacts
Confirmed ServiceNow MCP in this session is read-only (no comment/update tool) — reply must be pasted manually into ITSM
Created concept notes for INC27727425, Emarsys, primaryCdpId, and Yedidyah; added INC27727425 to SAP Work Board In Progress; appended thin SAP journal section
sessions.blockers: Awaiting customer confirmation on Emarsys sync path (automatic vs legacy) and cd_id presence on chaitanya.atchutuni@gmail.com / achaisa0688@gmail.com; user sign-off name still unconfirmed
